name: WolfHost
description: Complete web hosting platform — customer management, billing, domains, email, SSL, FTP, and a white-label customer portal. Includes DirectAdmin backend support.
author: Wolf Software Systems Ltd

name: WolfCustom
description: White-label branding — replace the WolfStack logo, product name, colours, favicon, and copyright with your own company identity.
author: Wolf Software Systems Ltd

name: WolfSecure
description: Security scanner — audits containers, config, network surface, and host hygiene for known-bad patterns. Uses Trivy for CVE scanning when available. Findings appear under Settings → Security.
author: Wolf Software Systems Ltd
